# 2026-03-27 — Friday

Slept poorly. Two coffees before noon — regret.

Refactored lora. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Refactored anthropic. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Priya pushed the httpx bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Worked on the ruff pass. 0.82 is the right knob; 0.86 over-merged, 0.92 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Made pasta. Ate pasta. Read. Slept.

Ran into Tomás at Belém. First time in months. Agreed to dinner next week; we'll see.

Hiked Lisbon on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Half of "rewriting" is deleting.
